verdict.note: amend-based ack trips main-guard on a trunk merge commit (MERGE_HEAD gone by amend time); drift stays un-quietable without ALLOW_MAIN
empty Spec-OK stamp clears main-guard on a trunk merge commit (even with a dirty index), trailer parses, drift quieted; tree-changing direct commits still blocked
addendum 2: node commit passes guard, --no-ff merge lands, drift visible, spex ack lands Spec-OK on trunk w/o ALLOW_MAIN, drift gone, tree-changing trunk commit still blocked
